name: ya-namp
description: Yandex Music player with a classic Winamp UI

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w client && npm run build:server
scripts.start: npm run build -w client && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run start -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
